method.ev_boundary: This loop does not create calibrated probabilities, EV, usable rows, sizing, or orders.
method.label_rule: Attach outcomes only from public settled Kalshi market payloads matched by exact ticker.

method.proxy_boundary: Coinbase/public exchange data are model features only and never official settlement labels.
